title: Implement GunRightClickEvent trigger (RightClickItem/RightClickEmpty listener)

reference_files.reason: Right-click API - GunRightClickEvent triggered on PlayerInteractEvent.RightClickItem + RightClickEmpty, only when no container GUI open (player.containerMenu is default InventoryMenu)

acceptance_criteria: RightClickHandler created with listeners for PlayerInteractEvent.RightClickItem and PlayerInteractEvent.RightClickEmpty on NeoForge.EVENT_BUS
When player right-clicks and main-hand item is gun (ModularShootAPI.isGun):
Check player.containerMenu is default InventoryMenu (player not in any container GUI) - if in container, do NOT trigger GunRightClickEvent (installation flow handles that)
Fire GunRightClickEvent on NeoForge.EVENT_BUS with player + gun ItemStack
If event is cancelled by any listener: do nothing further (framework has no default right-click behavior)
If event not cancelled: framework does nothing (other mods handle behavior via their own listeners)
RightClickEmpty also triggers GunRightClickEvent (for empty-hand right-click with gun in main-hand)
